summary: Excellent soundboard capture of an epic April ’71 show with standout Bertha, Beach‑Boys‑style covers and pristine lossless audio.
review: The recording is a flawless SBD (soundboard) transfer that delivers crystal‑clear, lossless sound throughout. Fans rave about the performance – especially the soaring “Bertha,” the fun “Help Me Rhonda” cover and Ron’s fiery organ/vocal work on “Searchin’.” The concert is praised as a quintessential West Coast‑vibe Dead show.

ai_rating.rationale: All four reviewers gave 5‑star ratings, praising both the musical performance and the pristine soundboard recording with no noted flaws.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Lossless SBD transfer described as crystal‑clear, no dropouts or muddiness; listeners note it sounds like a pristine studio‑level capture.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The concert is highlighted as an epic, West‑Coast‑sound showcase with strong energy throughout; covers blend seamlessly into the Dead’s own material.

band_member_comments.Keys: Ron "Pigpen" provides powerful organ work and lead/backup vocals, especially noted on “Searchin’.”
